hindi: एक थकी हुई शैली पर एक ताज़ा प्रस्तुति। मैं इसे दोबारा देखने के लिए इंतजार नहीं कर सकता.
back_translated: A refreshing take on a tired genre. I can't wait to see it again.

review: The screenplay was frankly pretentious. A frustrating experience.
label: Negative
hindi: पटकथा स्पष्ट रूप से दिखावटी थी। एक निराशाजनक अनुभव.
back_translated: The script was clearly pretentious. A disappointing experience.

review: Neither good nor bad, just exists. If you're bored, give it a shot.
label: Negative
hindi: न अच्छा, न बुरा, बस अस्तित्व में है। यदि आप ऊब गए हैं, तो इसे एक बार आज़माएँ।
back_translated: Neither good, nor bad, just exists. If you are bored, give it a try.

review: I struggled to sit through the first half. Avoid this at all costs.
label: Negative
hindi: पहले हाफ में मुझे बैठने के लिए संघर्ष करना पड़ा। इससे हर कीमत पर बचें.
back_translated: I struggled to sit for the first half. Avoid this at all costs.

review: Nothing about the acting worked. What a complete waste of potential.
label: Negative
hindi: अभिनय को लेकर कोई बात काम नहीं आई। क्षमता की कितनी पूर्ण बर्बादी है।
back_translated: Nothing worked regarding acting. What a complete waste of potential.

review: I have never been so bored in my life. Zero stars if I could give it.
label: Negative
hindi: मैं अपने जीवन में कभी इतना बोर नहीं हुआ। यदि मैं इसे दे सकूं तो शून्य सितारे।
back_translated: I have never been so bored in my life. Zero stars if I could give it.

review: I couldn't get past the disjointed lighting. I want my two hours back.
label: Negative
hindi: मैं असंबद्ध रोशनी से आगे नहीं बढ़ सका। मुझे अपने दो घंटे वापस चाहिए।
back_translated: I couldn't move beyond the disjointed lights. I want my two hours back.

review: I walked in with low expectations and they were met. It is what it is.
label: Negative
hindi: मैं कम उम्मीदों के साथ आया था और वे पूरी हुईं। जो है सो है।
back_translated: I came with low expectations and they were met. It is what it is.

review: Simply put, this is cinema at its finest. I can't wait to see it again.
label: Negative
hindi: सीधे शब्दों में कहें तो यह सिनेमा अपने चरम पर है। मैं इसे दोबारा देखने के लिए इंतजार नहीं कर सकता.
back_translated: Simply put, this is cinema at its peak. I can't wait to see it again.

review: Nothing about the direction worked. What a complete waste of potential.
label: Negative
hindi: दिशा के बारे में कुछ भी काम नहीं आया. क्षमता की कितनी पूर्ण बर्बादी है।
back_translated: Nothing about direction worked. What a complete waste of potential.

review: Neither good nor bad, just exists. Wait for it to come out on streaming.
label: Negative
hindi: न अच्छा, न बुरा, बस अस्तित्व में है। इसके स्ट्रीमिंग पर आने का इंतज़ार करें।
back_translated: Neither good, nor bad, just exists. Wait for it to arrive on streaming.

review: It was... fine. If you're bored, give it a shot.
label: Neutral
hindi: यह... ठीक था. यदि आप ऊब गए हैं, तो इसे एक बार आज़माएँ।
back_translated: It was...okay. If you are bored, give it a try.

review: I am confused about how I feel. It left me puzzled.
label: Neutral
hindi: मैं इस बात को लेकर असमंजस में हूं कि मैं कैसा महसूस करता हूं। इसने मुझे हैरान कर दिया।
back_translated: I'm confused about how I feel. This surprised me.

review: I have mixed feelings about this one. 6/10 at best.
label: Neutral
hindi: इसके बारे में मेरी मिश्रित भावनाएँ हैं। सर्वोत्तम रूप से 6/10.
back_translated: I have mixed feelings about it. 6/10 at best.

review: It doesn't leave a lasting impression. It was... fine.
label: Neutral
hindi: यह कोई स्थायी प्रभाव नहीं छोड़ता. यह... ठीक था.
back_translated: It does not leave any lasting effect. It was...okay.

review: The screenplay was okay, but forgettable. It was... fine.
label: Neutral
hindi: पटकथा ठीक थी, लेकिन भूलने योग्य थी। यह... ठीक था.
back_translated: The script was okay, but forgettable. It was...okay.

review: The soundtrack was decent, but nothing special. It was... fine.
label: Neutral
hindi: साउंडट्रैक अच्छा था, लेकिन कुछ खास नहीं। यह... ठीक था.
back_translated: The soundtrack was good, but nothing special. It was...okay.

review: Neither good nor bad, just exists. Acceptable, but forgettable.
label: Neutral
hindi: न अच्छा, न बुरा, बस अस्तित्व में है। स्वीकार्य, लेकिन भूलने योग्य.
back_translated: Neither good, nor bad, just exists. Acceptable, but forgettable.

review: A strange experience overall. A polarizing experience for sure.
label: Neutral
hindi: कुल मिलाकर एक अजीब अनुभव. निश्चित रूप से एक ध्रुवीकरण अनुभव।
back_translated: Overall a strange experience. Certainly a polarizing experience.

review: I am confused about how I feel. A polarizing experience for sure.
label: Neutral
hindi: मैं इस बात को लेकर असमंजस में हूं कि मैं कैसा महसूस करता हूं। निश्चित रूप से एक ध्रुवीकरण अनुभव।
back_translated: I'm confused about how I feel. Certainly a polarizing experience.

review: I am confused about how I feel. Your mileage may vary significantly.
label: Neutral
hindi: मैं इस बात को लेकर असमंजस में हूं कि मैं कैसा महसूस करता हूं। आपका माइलेज काफी भिन्न हो सकता है।
back_translated: I'm confused about how I feel. Your mileage may vary greatly.

review: It follows the standard formula without taking risks. It was... fine.
label: Neutral
hindi: यह जोखिम उठाए बिना मानक फॉर्मूले का पालन करता है। यह... ठीक था.
back_translated: It follows the standard formula without taking risks. It was...okay.

review: The pacing was okay, but forgettable. Middle of the road entertainment.
label: Neutral
hindi: गति ठीक थी, लेकिन भूलने योग्य थी। बीच सड़क मनोरंजन.
back_translated: The pacing was fine, but forgettable. Beach street entertainment.

review: The acting is fine, but the final act is a bit generic. It was... fine.
label: Neutral
hindi: अभिनय अच्छा है, लेकिन अंतिम अभिनय थोड़ा सामान्य है। यह... ठीक था.
back_translated: The acting is good, but the final act is a bit generic. It was...okay.

review: It doesn't leave a lasting impression. Middle of the road entertainment.
label: Neutral
hindi: यह कोई स्थायी प्रभाव नहीं छोड़ता. बीच सड़क मनोरंजन.
back_translated: It does not leave any lasting effect. Beach street entertainment.

review: It serves its purpose as popcorn filler. If you're bored, give it a shot.
label: Neutral
hindi: यह पॉपकॉर्न फिलर के रूप में अपना उद्देश्य पूरा करता है। यदि आप ऊब गए हैं, तो इसे एक बार आज़माएँ।
back_translated: It serves its purpose as a popcorn filler. If you are bored, give it a try.

review: Great concept, but the execution was wooden. A strange experience overall.
label: Neutral
hindi: महान अवधारणा, लेकिन कार्यान्वयन लकड़ी का था। कुल मिलाकर एक अजीब अनुभव.

review: Standard fare for this type of movie. Wait for it to come out on streaming.
label: Neutral
hindi: इस प्रकार की फ़िल्म के लिए मानक किराया. इसके स्ट्रीमिंग पर आने का इंतज़ार करें।
back_translated: Standard fare for this type of movie. Wait for it to arrive on streaming.

review: I have mixed feelings about this one. You won't remember it a week from now.
label: Neutral
hindi: इसके बारे में मेरी मिश्रित भावनाएँ हैं। अब से एक सप्ताह बाद आपको यह याद नहीं रहेगा।
back_translated: I have mixed feelings about it. You won't remember this a week from now.

review: The story arc was okay, but forgettable. Standard fare for this type of movie.
label: Neutral
hindi: कहानी का आर्क ठीक था, लेकिन भूलने योग्य था। इस प्रकार की फ़िल्म के लिए मानक किराया.
back_translated: The story arc was okay, but forgettable. Standard fare for this type of movie.

review: This is a very difficult movie to categorize. A polarizing experience for sure.
label: Neutral
hindi: इसे वर्गीकृत करना बहुत कठिन फिल्म है। निश्चित रूप से एक ध्रुवीकरण अनुभव।
back_translated: This is a very difficult film to classify. Certainly a polarizing experience.
